name: C-7 --include-models adds machine-learning-model components to the bom per the architecture AI/ML extension
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v1.0.0 --emit a.json --include-models claude-opus-4-7 && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("a.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.components.some(c=>c.type==="machine-learning-model"&&c.name==="claude-opus-4-7")?0:1)' && echo included 1>&2
